# growthbook_fact_table_filter (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook fact table filter by fact table ID and filter ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fact_table_id` (String) ID of the fact table the filter belongs to.
- `id` (String) Unique fact table filter identifier.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `description` (String) Filter description.
- `managed_by` (String) Where the filter is managed from.
- `name` (String) Filter name.
- `value` (String) SQL expression for this filter.
